title: ctenitis dolphinensis
intro: Ctenitis dolphinensis, a type of fern species, is a plant native to the tropical regions of Asia and Pacific islands. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing antioxidant properties. Ctenitis dolphinensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
